comment: Default-FAIL verification contract for T-001 (medium, acceptance-first). Populated after the quality gate reran tests/hitl-wfi-terminal.tests.sh/.ps1 (16/16 passed both lanes, 0 SKIP) and the epic-159-pillar-a2 regression set (4 loop suites + check-placeholders + template-validator-parity + crlf-parity + constant-parity + guard-ps1-ascii + second-approval-mask + validate-repository, all green, 0 failed suites). Shell stack waives the three compile-oriented checks (lint/typecheck/build); this task ships only new tests/ suite files plus unprotected registration edits, with no compiled toolchain.

checks.waiver_reason: No lint tool configured for this repository's shell/PowerShell/JSON test-infrastructure files (stack: shell); bash -n and pwsh parse validity are exercised implicitly by every green run recorded in focused-tests.log.
No static type-check command is configured for shell/PowerShell/JSON test-infrastructure files.

The HITL leg drives a fixture COPY of the real hitl-loop.template.sh through mocked stdin and a CHECK stub, and the WFI-audit leg is a deterministic reference check on fixture-scoped WFI-NNN.md copies; no separate service-integration surface exists beyond what unit/acceptance already exercise.
No compile/build toolchain for shell/PowerShell/JSON test-infrastructure files.
No runnable UI/service; this task adds only test-infrastructure (the HITL cap-5 leg plus the WFI-audit terminal-behavior leg), fully covered by the focused and regression logs.
No baseline-behavior.md; this is not a refactor/bugfix task (differential-test-policy.md does not apply).
No user-facing UI surface; this task adds only tests/hitl-wfi-terminal.tests.{sh,ps1} plus registration edits to run-all.sh/.ps1 and test.yml.
ds_profile: none; no design-system/ directory exists in this repository.
